The '''Frieste River''' was a prominent river of liquid [[Water/Legends|water]] in the southern hemisphere of the frigid [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Rhinnal/Legends|Rhinnal]]. The [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Rhire]] was built along the Frieste. A [[Jedi chapter house (Rhinnal)|Jedi chapter house]] was constructed on its [[Color/Legends|gray]] banks. Stationed all along the Frieste River were [[hydroelectric energy plants]].<ref name="Rhire" />
